challenge.explanation:
Jake sumnja da je napadač mogao koristiti an open port or another vulnerability za pristup putem zaobilaženja firewalla. Traži kako je sigurnosna zaštita prełamana.

Obratite pažnju na to kako ranjivosti firewalla mogu biti iskorišćene kao ulazne tačke za napadače.
challenge.instructions: Pročitajte tekst i odgovorite na pitanje koje je navedeno/nalazi se ispod.

questions.text:
Jake je odlučio da pošalje e-mail sigurnosnom timu kako bi ih obavestio o nedavnom sigurnosnom proboju i zatražio njihovu pomoć u istraživanju.

Subject: URGENT. Security Breach Investigation in Progress

Hi team,

We detected unusual activity on our internal network last night, indicating a potential security breach. While reviewing the logs, we found a high volume of traffic from a specific IP address, which suggests a targeted attack. At this point, we are unsure how they got past our firewall, but we are investigating whether an open port or another vulnerability was exploited.

Our immediate steps are:

1. Isolating affected systems to prevent further access.

2. Running a full security scan to assess the extent of the breach.

3. Reviewing access logs to determine which files or systems were compromised.

Please prioritize this investigation and report any findings as soon as possible. If you notice anything unusual in the logs or have any insights, let me know immediately.

Thanks,

Jake

Zašto Jake pominje otvoreni port ili drugu ranjivost?

answers.answer: Želim da zatvorim sve otvorene portove odjednom.
answers.feedback: Jake još uvek istražuje i nije doneo odluku o zatvaranju svih portova.

answers.answer: Veruje da je napadač koristio ukradene lozinke.

answers.feedback: Jake i dalje istražuje proboj, ne potvrđujući da je uklonjeno.

challenge.title: Vežba 159
